title: astragalus canadensis
intro: Astragalus canadensis, also known as Canadian milkvetch or Canadian astragalus, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus canadensis include reducing the severity of colds and flu, improving immune function, and exerting antioxidant effects to prevent cell damage. Astragalus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
